Commentary leans on "The psalm concludes with priestly blessing: 'The LORD that made heaven and earth bless thee o...". Cross references echo "Blessing".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The psalm concludes with priestly blessing: 'The LORD that made heaven and earth bless thee o...". Word-study detail reinforces "וָאָֽרֶץ׃: and earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
